base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mario_full_poseset — a character (playable) from 1990 super mario world. Mario — Small/Super/Fire/Cape forms × stand/walk/run/jump/crouch/swim/slide/spin-jump (new!)/climb/pipe/Yoshi-ride/Yoshi-dismount/throw-turtle-shell/throw-item/Goal-tape/cleared. 1004×3618 massive atlas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
